steps.title: Find the goal of the act
steps.content: The sentence ends "ensuring that the trail would not be sold or commercially developed." Congress passed the act to keep the wilderness areas safe from sale and development. The blank needs a verb that means "keep safe from harm."

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: "Protect" means to shield from harm or loss — exactly what preventing sale and commercial development does for the wilderness areas.

steps.title: Eliminate by rule
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'borrow': means to take temporarily, which has nothing to do with shielding land from development. Misread of the purpose. ✗
  • Choice B — 'postpone': means to delay an event, but the text does not describe any scheduled event being pushed back — it describes ongoing safeguarding. Misread. ✗
  • Choice C — 'protect': directly captures "keep from being sold or commercially developed." ✓
  • Choice D — 'decorate': means to add ornament, which is unrelated to preventing commercial use. Overreach to a meaning the text does not support. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
